mapper.select: SELECT tool_id, tool_code, tool_name, description FROM tools ORDER BY tool_code
SELECT d.tool_id, d.tool_code, d.tool_name, d.description FROM group_tool_mapping m JOIN tools d ON d.tool_id = m.tool_id WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} AND m.is_enabled = TRUE ORDER BY d.tool_code

SELECT tool_code FROM tools WHERE tool_code IN
#{toolCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tools (tool_code, tool_name, description) VALUES (#{tool.toolCode}, #{tool.toolName}, #{tool.description})
INSERT IGNORE INTO group_tool_mapping (group_id, tool_id, is_enabled) SELECT #{groupId}, t.tool_id, TRUE FROM tools t
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.tool_id as toolId, m.is_enabled as isEnabled, t.tool_name as toolName, t.description as toolDesc FROM group_tool_mapping m JOIN tools t ON m.tool_id = t.tool_id WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY m.id
